text.title: Feature Flag Rollout Runbook Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply feature-flag-rollout-runbook. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Define cohorts
step.description: Input: User base + flag platform. Action: Stable-hash cohorts at 1/10/50/100.. Output: Cohort spec..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: User base + flag platform.

step.name: Wire auto-rollback
step.description: Input: SLO thresholds. Action: Alert → flag-flip via webhook.. Output: Auto-rollback live..

step.name: Stage rollout
step.description: Input: Cohort spec. Action: Advance stages with min-hold time; pause if abnormal.. Output: Live rollout..

step.name: Bake-in 100%
step.description: Input: Live rollout. Action: ≥7 days steady-state.. Output: Stable feature..

step.name: Cleanup
step.description: Input: Stable feature. Action: Open PR removing the flag + dead branches.. Output: Flag removed..
